title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at ITC Limited

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at ITC Limited
jsonLd.description:
We at ITC Limited are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ITC Limited:
ITC Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Limited!
